title: Write FO-13 E2E test suite
description: Create e2e/fo-13.test.ts with 3 test paths: (1) Happy path — full 40 cards (discovery → Phase 1 4×5 → Create-List Continue → Phase 2 20 → Theme → Notifications → Premium → Feed), (2) Skip-context variant — rich goal answer triggers skip of Screen 5, (3) Add more later variant — Create-List 'Add more later' → jumps to Theme. Use FO-12 E2E as reference for Playwright patterns. Use waitForNextCard helper for card transitions.
